---
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    embed-resources: TRUE
    code-fold: true
    page-layout: full
    fig_caption: yes
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE
)

# load packages
library(shiny)
library(highcharter)
library(dplyr)
library(htmlwidgets)
library(dplyr)
library(htmltools)
library(reactable)
library(reactablefmtr)
library(htmltools)
library(tippy)
library(reactable)
library(tidyr)

# load data
source("prep/library.R")
source("prep/functions.R")
source("prep/dataframes.R")

state_for_report <- "Missouri"

# NCRP source
ncrp_pop_source <- paste0("NCRP Year End Population (", select_year, ")")
ncrp_rel_source <- paste0("NCRP Releases (", select_year, ")")
ncrp_adm_source <- paste0("NCRP Admissions (", select_year, ")")

# Census source
census_source <- paste0("Census (", select_year, ")")

# BJS source
bjs_source <- paste0("BJS Prisoners (2010-", select_year, ")")

# APS source
aps_source <- "Annual Parole Survey (2010-2018)"

# NCRP note about parole-eligible populations
ncrp_pe_note <- "Parole-eligible populations only include people in prison for a new crime and with original sentence lengths of 1 to 25 years."

# no data text
no_data_text <- paste0("No Data. ", state_for_report, " did not submit data to the National Corrections Reporting Program in ", select_year, ".")
```


```{r}
################################################################################

# Highlight Section at Top

################################################################################

# Create title for prison sentencing information
prison_sentencing_system_info <- HTML("Prison Sentencing<br>System&#9432;")

# Get prison sentencing information for state
prison_sentencing_system_name <- subset(robinainfo, state == state_for_report)$prison_sentencing_system

# Reformat text depending on prison sentencing information
prison_sentencing_system <- 
  case_when(
    prison_sentencing_system_name == "Extremely High Indeterminacy" ~ HTML("Extremely High<br>Indeterminacy"),
    prison_sentencing_system_name == "High Indeterminacy"           ~ HTML("High<br>Indeterminacy"),
    prison_sentencing_system_name == "Moderate Indeterminacy"       ~ HTML("Moderate<br>Indeterminacy"),
    prison_sentencing_system_name == "Low Indeterminacy"            ~ HTML("Low<br>Indeterminacy"),
    prison_sentencing_system_name == "Extremely Low Indeterminacy"  ~ HTML("Extremely Low<br>Indeterminacy"))

# Get prison sentencing information's definition
prison_sentencing_system_definition <- subset(robinadefinitions, term == prison_sentencing_system_name)$definition 

# Assemble all prison sentencing information for the state
prison_sentencing_system_tooltip <- 
  HTML(paste0("To compare the degrees of indeterminacy, or unpredictability
   of time served, of prison-sentencing systems of different jurisdictions,
   we use a qualitative ranking framework based on the Robina Institute's
   Prison-release Discretion And Prison Population Size Report.<br><br><b>", 
   prison_sentencing_system_name, "</b>: ",
   prison_sentencing_system_definition, "."))

# Make the information accessible
prison_sentencing_system_info <- paste0('<span aria-label="', prison_sentencing_system_tooltip, '" tabindex="0" role="button">', prison_sentencing_system_info, '</span>')

# Get number if people currently eligible and eligible in the future for parole
if (state_for_report %in% unique(parole_eligibility_table_select_year$state)) {
  state_data <- parole_eligibility_table_select_year %>% filter(state == state_for_report)
} else {
  state_data <- no_data_text
}
num_people_current   <- sum(state_data$current_count, na.rm = TRUE)
num_people_1_5_years <- sum(state_data$future_1_5_years_count, na.rm = TRUE)









################################################################################

# Prison Population Tab

################################################################################

# Year end population since 2010
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_yearendpop_by_year)) {
  state_yearendpop_by_year <-
    all_yearendpop_by_year[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_size(height = 400) %>%
    hc_colors(c(yellow)) %>%
    hc_title(text = paste0("Year-End Prison Population from 2010 to ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", bjs_source))
} else {
  state_yearendpop_by_year <- no_data_text
}

# Prison releases since 2010
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_releases_by_year)) {
  state_releases_by_year <-
    all_releases_by_year[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_size(height = 400) %>%
    hc_colors(c(yellow)) %>%
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Releases from 2010 to ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", bjs_source))
} else {
  state_releases_by_year <- no_data_text
}

# Prison admissions since 2010
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_admissions_by_year)) {
  state_admissions_by_year <-
    all_admissions_by_year[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_size(height = 400) %>%
    hc_colors(c(yellow)) %>%
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Admissions from 2010 to ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", bjs_source))
} else {
  state_admissions_by_year <- no_data_text
}

# Stacked bar chart showing distribution of prison population by admission type
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_stackedbar_admtype)) {
  state_stackedbar_admtype <-
    all_stackedbar_admtype[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_size(height = 200) %>%
    hc_colors(c(teal, yellow)) %>%
    hc_title(text = paste0("Distribution of the Prison Population by Admission Type", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_chart(marginBottom = 10) %>%
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_stackedbar_admtype <- no_data_text
}

# Sentence about distribution of prison population by admission type
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_parole_elgibility_fbi_index)) {
  state_sentence_admtype <- 
    all_sentence_admtype[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_admtype <- ""
}

###################
# Who is in Prison?
###################

# Stacked bar chart showing distribution of people by race
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_stackedbar_prison_race)) {
  state_stackedbar_prison_race <-
    all_stackedbar_prison_race[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_colors(c(neutralBkgndMedium, "darkgray", yellow, purple, teal)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Population by Race and Ethnicity", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_size(height = 400) %>%
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_stackedbar_prison_race <- no_data_text
}

# Sentence
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_prison_race)) {
  state_sentence_prison_race <- 
    all_sentence_prison_race[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_prison_race <- ""
}

# Stacked bar chart showing distribution of people by gender
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_stackedbar_prison_gender)) {
  state_stackedbar_prison_gender <-
    all_stackedbar_prison_gender[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Population by Gender", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_size(height = 400) %>%
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_stackedbar_prison_gender <- no_data_text
}

# Sentence
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_prison_gender)) {
  state_sentence_prison_gender <- 
    all_sentence_prison_gender[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_prison_gender <- ""
}

# Stacked bar chart showing distribution of people by ageyrend
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_stackedbar_prison_ageyrend)) {
  state_stackedbar_prison_ageyrend <-
    all_stackedbar_prison_ageyrend[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Population by Age", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_size(height = 400) %>%
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_stackedbar_prison_ageyrend <- no_data_text
}

# Sentence
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_prison_ageyrend)) {
  state_sentence_prison_ageyrend <- 
    all_sentence_prison_ageyrend[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_prison_ageyrend <- ""
}

###################
# Sentence Length
###################

# grouped barchart showing the proportion of the prison population by sentlgth and admtype
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_groupedbar_prison_sentlgth)) {
  state_groupedbar_prison_sentlgth <- 
    all_groupedbar_prison_sentlgth[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Option 1: Prison Population by Sentence Length and Admission Type", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_groupedbar_prison_sentlgth <- no_data_text
}

# barchart showing the proportion of the prison population by sentlgth
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_prison_sentlgth)) {
  state_bar_prison_sentlgth <- 
    all_bar_prison_sentlgth[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Population by Sentence Length", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_bar_prison_sentlgth <- no_data_text
}

###################
# Criminal Offenses
###################

# grouped barchart showing the proportion of the prison population by sentlgth and admtype
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_groupedbar_prison_fbi_index)) {
  state_groupedbar_prison_fbi_index <- 
    all_groupedbar_prison_fbi_index[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Option 1: Prison Population by Criminal Offense and Admission Type", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_groupedbar_prison_fbi_index <- no_data_text
}

# barchart showing the proportion of the prison population by sentlgth
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_prison_fbi_index)) {
  state_bar_prison_fbi_index <- 
    all_bar_prison_fbi_index[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_colors(c(yellow)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Population by Criminal Offense", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_bar_prison_fbi_index <- no_data_text
}



################################################################################

# Parole Eligibility Tab

################################################################################

###################
# Parole-Eligible Prison Population
###################

# Stacked bar chart showing the  proportion of parole eligibility types
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_stackedbar_pe_type)) {
  state_stackedbar_pe_type <- 
    all_stackedbar_pe_type[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_colors(c(neutralBkgndMedium, "darkgray", yellow, purple, teal)) %>% 
    hc_size(height = 300) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Population by Parole Eligibility Status", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_chart(marginBottom = 50) %>%
    hc_caption(
               text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source, ". Note: ", ncrp_pe_note,
                             "The 'Other' population includes people in prison who are eligible for parole, 
                             in prison for less than 1 year or more than 25 years, and in prison for a parole return."))
} else {
  state_stackedbar_pe_type <- no_data_text
}

# Sentence about parole-eligible population
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_parole_elgibility_population)) {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_population <- 
    all_sentence_parole_elgibility_population[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_population <- ""
}


###################
# How is Parole Eligibility Determined?
###################

# Get parole eligibility information by state
parole_eligibility_criteria <- subset(robinaparoleeligibility, 
                                      state == state_for_report)$general_rules_of_release_eligibility


###################
# People who are Eligible for Parole
###################

##########
# Race
##########

# Sentence about PE by race and by state
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_parole_elgibility_race)) {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_race <- 
    all_sentence_parole_elgibility_race[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_race <- ""
}

# Bar chart of people eligible for parole but still in prison by race
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_parole_elgibility_race)) {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_race <- 
    all_bar_parole_elgibility_race[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_size(height = 350) %>% 
    hc_colors(c(teal)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Parole-Eligible Prison Population by Race and Ethnicity", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
               text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source, ". Note: ", ncrp_pe_note))
} else {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_race <- no_data_text
}

##########
# Gender
##########

# Sentence about PE by gender and by state
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_parole_elgibility_gender)) {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_gender <- 
    all_sentence_parole_elgibility_gender[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_gender <- ""
}

# Bar chart of people eligible for parole but still in prison by gender
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_parole_elgibility_gender)) {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_gender <- 
    all_bar_parole_elgibility_gender[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_size(height = 350) %>% 
    hc_colors(c(teal)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Parole-Eligible Prison Population by Gender", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
               text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source, ". Note: ", ncrp_pe_note))
} else {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_gender <- no_data_text
}

##########
# Age
##########

# Sentence about PE by ageyrend and by state
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_parole_elgibility_ageyrend)) {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_ageyrend <- 
    all_sentence_parole_elgibility_ageyrend[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_ageyrend <- ""
}

# Bar chart of people eligible for parole but still in prison by ageyrend
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_parole_elgibility_ageyrend)) {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_ageyrend <- 
    all_bar_parole_elgibility_ageyrend[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_size(height = 350) %>% 
    hc_colors(c(teal)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Parole-Eligible Prison Population by Age", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
               text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source, ". Note: ", ncrp_pe_note))
} else {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_ageyrend <- no_data_text
}


###################
# Sentence Lengths for the Parole-Eligible Prison Population
###################

# Sentence
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_parole_elgibility_sentlgth)) {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_sentlgth <- 
    all_sentence_parole_elgibility_sentlgth[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_sentlgth <- ""
}

# Bar chart
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_parole_elgibility_sentlgth)) {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_sentlgth <- 
    all_bar_parole_elgibility_sentlgth[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_size(height = 350) %>% 
    hc_colors(c(orange)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Parole-Eligible Prison Population by Sentence Length", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
               text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source, ". Note: ", ncrp_pe_note))
} else {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_sentlgth <- no_data_text
}


###################
# Criminal Offenses for the Parole-Eligible Prison Population
###################

# Sentence
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_sentence_parole_elgibility_fbi_index)) {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_fbi_index <- 
    all_sentence_parole_elgibility_fbi_index[[state_for_report]]
} else {
  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_fbi_index <- ""
}

# Bar chart of most serious sentenced offense by state - new crime
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_parole_elgibility_fbi_index)) {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_fbi_index <- 
    all_bar_parole_elgibility_fbi_index[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_size(height = 500) %>% 
    hc_colors(c(yellow)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Parole-Eligible Prison Population by Criminal Offense", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
               text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source, ". Note: ", ncrp_pe_note))
} else {
  state_bar_parole_elgibility_fbi_index <- no_data_text
}







################################################################################

# Releases Tab

################################################################################

###################
# Release Trends
###################

# Proportion of Parole-Eligible Population Released from 2010 to select year
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_stackedbar_parole_eligibility_release)) {
  state_stackedbar_parole_eligibility_release <-
    all_stackedbar_parole_eligibility_release[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_colors(c(orange, yellow)) %>%
    hc_size(height = 400) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Proportion of Parole-Eligible Population Released", " from 2010 to ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_chart(marginBottom = 50) %>%
    hc_caption(
               text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_rel_source))
} else {
  state_stackedbar_parole_eligibility_release <- no_data_text
}

# Timing of Releases Relative to Parole Eligibility Year by release type in select year
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_groupedbar_release_timing_reltype)) {
  state_groupedbar_release_timing_reltype <-
    all_groupedbar_release_timing_reltype[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_size(height = 375) %>% 
    hc_colors(c(neutralBkgndMedium, darkblue, yellow, teal, purple)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Timing of Prison Releases Relative to Parole Eligibility Year by Release Type", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
               text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_rel_source))
} else {
  state_groupedbar_release_timing_reltype <- no_data_text
}


###################
# Demographics
###################

# Bar chart of releases by race and ethnicity
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_release_race)) {
  state_bar_release_race <- 
    all_bar_release_race[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_size(width = 700, 
            height = 350) %>% 
    hc_colors(c(purple)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Releases by Race and Ethnicity", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
           text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_rel_source))
} else {
  state_bar_release_race <- no_data_text
}

# Bar chart of releases by gender
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_release_gender)) {
  state_bar_release_gender <- 
    all_bar_release_gender[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_size(width = 700, 
            height = 350) %>% 
    hc_colors(c(purple)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Releases by Gender", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
           text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_rel_source))
} else {
  state_bar_release_gender <- no_data_text
}

# Bar chart of releases by age
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_release_agerlse)) {
  state_bar_release_agerlse <- 
    all_bar_release_agerlse[[state_for_report]] %>% 
    hc_size(width = 700, 
            height = 350) %>% 
    hc_colors(c(purple)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Prison Releases by Age", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
           text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_rel_source))
} else {
  state_bar_release_agerlse <- no_data_text
}



###################
# Unconditional vs Conditional Releases
###################

# Pie chart showing distribution of releases by release type
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_pie_release_type)) {
  state_pie_release_type <-
    all_pie_release_type[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_size(height = 275) %>%
    hc_colors(c(teal, purple)) %>%
    hc_title(text = paste0("Distribution of Prison Releases by Release Type", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
           text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_rel_source))
} else {
  state_pie_release_type <- no_data_text
}

###################
# Release Timing by Offense Type
###################

# Stacked bar chart showing release timing by offense type
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_groupedbar_release_timing_fbi_index)) {
  state_groupedbar_release_timing_fbi_index <-
    all_groupedbar_release_timing_fbi_index[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_colors(c(neutralBkgndMedium, darkblue, yellow, teal, purple)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Release Timing by Offense Type", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
           text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_rel_source))
} else {
  state_groupedbar_release_timing_fbi_index <- no_data_text
}

###################
# Time Served by Offense Type
###################

# if (state_for_report %in% names(all_groupedbar_los_by_offense)) {
#   state_groupedbar_los_by_offense <-
#     all_groupedbar_los_by_offense[[state_for_report]] %>%
#     hc_title(text = paste0("Average and Median Length of Stay by Offense Type", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
#     hc_caption(
#            text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_rel_source))
# } else {
#   state_groupedbar_los_by_offense <- no_data_text
# }

if (state_for_report %in% names(all_bar_los_by_offense)) {
  state_bar_los_by_offense <-
    all_bar_los_by_offense[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_title(text = paste0("Average Time Served by Offense Type", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
           text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_rel_source))
} else {
  state_bar_los_by_offense <- no_data_text
}









################################################################################

# Disparities Tab

################################################################################

###################
# Gender
###################

###################
# Race and Ethnicity
###################

# Grouped bar chart showing percentage of population in community, in prison but parole eligible,
# and people released at parole eligibility 
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_groupedbar_disparities_race)) {
  state_groupedbar_disparities_race <-
    all_groupedbar_disparities_race[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_colors(c(neutralBkgndDisabled, orange)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("People in the Community vs. in Prison by Race and Ethnicity", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_caption(
           text = paste0("Source: ", "BJS Prisoners (2020)", " and ", census_source))
} else {
  state_groupedbar_disparities_race <- no_data_text
}


# Grouped column chart showing percentage of population in community and in prison but parole eligible
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_groupedcolumn_disparities_release_race)) {
  state_groupedcolumn_disparities_release_race <-
    all_groupedcolumn_disparities_release_race[[state_for_report]] %>%
    # hc_colors(c("#FFAF00","#CC9617", "#997E2E","#666546","#334D5D", "#003474")) %>% 
    hc_colors(c("#FFAF00","#CCAE20", "#99AD40","#66AD60","#33AC80", "#00ABA0")) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Option 1: Release Timing after Parole Eligibility by Race and Ethnicity", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_chart(marginBottom = 50) %>%
    hc_caption(
           text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_groupedcolumn_disparities_release_race <- no_data_text
}

# Stacked column chart showing percentage of population in community and in prison but parole eligible
if (state_for_report %in% names(all_stackedcolumn_disparities_release_race)) {
  state_stackedcolumn_disparities_release_race <-
    all_stackedcolumn_disparities_release_race[[state_for_report]] %>%
    hc_colors(c(darkblue, purple, blue, teal, yellow, orange)) %>% 
    hc_title(text = paste0("Option 2: Release Timing after Parole Eligibility by Race and Ethnicity", " in ", select_year)) %>% 
    hc_chart(marginBottom = 50) %>%
    hc_caption(
           text = paste0("Source: ", ncrp_pop_source))
} else {
  state_stackedcolumn_disparities_release_race <- no_data_text
}





```



::: narrow-section
```{r}
########################################

# Highlights Section

########################################

div(
  id = "grid-container",
  style = "display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); justify-items: center;",
  div(id = "highlight-text", formattable::comma(num_people_current, digits = 0)),
  div(id = "highlight-text", formattable::comma(num_people_1_5_years, digits = 0)),
  div(style ="display: block; 
              font-size: 1.25em; 
              font-family: Graphik; 
              font-weight: bold; 
              text-align: center;",
      prison_sentencing_system),
  div(id = "bold-text", HTML("Currently Eligible<br>for Parole")),
  div(id = "bold-text", HTML("Eligible for Parole<br>in the next 1-5 years")),
  div(id = "bold-text", tippy(prison_sentencing_system_info,
                            placement = "bottom",
                            flip = TRUE,
                            theme = "light",
                            tooltip = prison_sentencing_system_tooltip))
)
```
:::
<br><br>














:::: {.panel-tabset .nav-pills}

## Prison Population
<center>

```{r}
########################################

# Prison Population Trends

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Prison Population Trends"), br()
    )
```

::: {.panel-tabset}
### Number of Admissions
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about change in admissions from 2010 to 2020."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_admissions_by_year), br()
    )
```

### Number of Releases
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about change in releases from 2010 to 2020."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_releases_by_year), br()
    )
```

### Year-End Population
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about change in year-end population from 2010 to 2020."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_yearendpop_by_year), br()
    )
```

:::

```{r}
########################################

# Prison Population by Admission Type

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Admission Types"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Prison populations are shaped by two primary groups: new court commitments, or individuals newly incarcerated for a criminal offense, and parole returns/revocations, those who return to prison for failing to meet the conditions of their parole.", state_sentence_admtype), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_stackedbar_admtype), br()
    )
```

```{r}
########################################

# Who's in Prison?

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Who's in Prison?"), br(),
    )
```
::: {.panel-tabset}
### Race and Ethinicity
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", state_sentence_prison_race), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_stackedbar_prison_race)
    )
```

### Gender
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", state_sentence_prison_gender), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_stackedbar_prison_gender)
    )
```

### Age
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", state_sentence_prison_ageyrend), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_stackedbar_prison_ageyrend)
    )
```
:::

```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Criminal Offense"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about most common offense."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_prison_fbi_index), br()
    )
```

```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Sentence Length"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about most common sentence length."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_prison_sentlgth), br(), br()
    )
```

</center>
<br>













## Parole Eligibility

<center>
```{r}

########################################

# How is Parole Eligibility Determined?

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "How is Parole Eligibility Determined?"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text",       parole_eligibility_criteria),            br(), br()
)

########################################

# Parole-Eligible Prison Population

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Parole-Eligible Prison Population"),           br(),
    div(id = "regular-text",       state_sentence_parole_elgibility_population),  br(), 
    div(id = "bar-chart",          state_stackedbar_pe_type),                     br(), br()
)

########################################

# People who are Eligible for Parole

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "People who are Eligible for Parole"), br()
    )
```
::: {.panel-tabset}
### Race and Ethnicity
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text",  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_race), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_parole_elgibility_race), br()
    )
```

### Gender
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text",  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_gender), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_parole_elgibility_gender), br()
    )
```

### Age
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text",  state_sentence_parole_elgibility_ageyrend), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_parole_elgibility_ageyrend), br()
    )
```
:::

```{r}
########################################

# Sentence Lengths

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Sentence Lengths"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", state_sentence_parole_elgibility_sentlgth), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_parole_elgibility_sentlgth), br(), br()
    )
```

```{r}
########################################

# Criminal Offenses

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Criminal Offenses"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", state_sentence_parole_elgibility_fbi_index), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_parole_elgibility_fbi_index), br()
    )
```

```{r}
########################################

# Missing Data

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Missing Data"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "This section will have information about missing parole eligibility data for the state once new NCRP data is released.")
)
```


</center>
<br>














## Releases
<center>
```{r}
########################################

# Release Trends

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Release Trends"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "The chart below shows an annual breakdown from 2010 to 2020 on the proportion of the parole-eligible population that was released each year compared to those who remained incarcerated despite their parole eligibility."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_stackedbar_parole_eligibility_release), br(), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about timing of release."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_groupedbar_release_timing_reltype), br(), br()
    )
```


```{r}
########################################

# Type of Release

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Type of Release"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about conditional and unconditional releases."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_pie_release_type), br(), br(), br()
    )
```

```{r}
########################################

# Demographics

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Demographics"), br()
    )
```

::: {.panel-tabset}
### Race and Ethnicity
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about race and ethnicity."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_release_race), br()
    )
```

### Gender
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about gender."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_release_gender), br()
    )
```

### Age
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about age at release."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_release_agerlse), br(), br()
    )
```
:::


```{r}
########################################

# Release Timing by Offense Type

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Release Timing by Offense Type"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence release timing by offense type."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_groupedbar_release_timing_fbi_index), br(), br(), br()
    )
```

```{r}
########################################

# Time Served by Offense Type

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Time Served by Offense Type"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Sentence about time served offense type."), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_bar_los_by_offense), br()
    )
```

</center>
<br>



















## Disparities
<center>

```{r}
########################################

# Race and Ethnicity

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Race and Ethnicity"), br()
)
```

::: {.panel-tabset}
### In Prison
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Option 1:"), br(),
    div(id = "bold-text", "For every White person in prison, there are 3.1 Black, non-Hispanic people in prison.")
)
```

<div id="body-section">
![](C:/Users/mroberts/The Council of State Governments/JC Research - Documents/RES_Parole/data/analysis/app/ggplots/rri_infograph_Georgia.png){ width=200px }
</div>

```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "bold-text", "For every White person in prison, there are 3.1 Hispanic people in prison.")
)
```

<div id="body-section">
![](C:/Users/mroberts/The Council of State Governments/JC Research - Documents/RES_Parole/data/analysis/app/ggplots/rri_infograph_Georgia.png){ width=200px }
</div>


```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Option 2:"), br(),
    div(id = "bold-text", "Disparities in Prison"), br()
)

# state_rri_in_prison_data <- rri_in_prison_data %>% filter(state == state_for_report)
# fnc_generate_rri_highlight(state_rri_in_prison_data, "in prison")
```

### In Prison but Parole-Eligible

### Released on Parole Eligibility Year

:::
```{r}
div(id = "body-section", br(), 
    div(id = "visualization", state_groupedbar_disparities_race), br(), br(), br(),
    div(id = "visualization", state_groupedcolumn_disparities_release_race), br(), 
    div(id = "visualization", state_stackedcolumn_disparities_release_race), br(), br()
)
```

```{r}
div(id = "body-section", 
    div(id = "graph-title", "TBD Visualization: Time Served by Race and Ethnicity in 2020"), br()
)
```

```{r}
########################################

# Gender

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Gender"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "TBD: Same visualizations as above?"), br()
)
```

```{r}
########################################

# Age

########################################
div(id = "body-section", br(),
    div(id = "big-section-title", "Age"), br(),
    div(id = "regular-text", "Just one visualization on time served by age category?"), br()
)
```

</center>
<br>


::::

::: citation-section
**Citations:** 

Alper, Mariel E., et al. "Profiles in Parole Release and Revocation: Examining the Legal Framework in the United States." *Robina Institute of Criminal Law and Criminal Justice*, 13 May 2022, [https://robinainstitute.umn.edu/publications/profiles-parole-release-and-revocation-examining-legal-framework-united-states](https://robinainstitute.umn.edu/publications/profiles-parole-release-and-revocation-examining-legal-framework-united-states).     

Carson, Ann E. "Prisoners in 2020 – Statistical Tables." Bureau of Justice Statistics, 1 Dec. 2020, [bjs.ojp.gov/library/publications/prisoners-2020-statistical-tables](bjs.ojp.gov/library/publications/prisoners-2020-statistical-tables).       

Robina Institute of Criminal Law and Criminal Justice. "Prison-Release Discretion and Prison Population Size State Reports." Accessed November 8, 2023. [https://robinainstitute.umn.edu/publications/prison-release-discretion-and-prison-population-size-state-reports](https://robinainstitute.umn.edu/publications/prison-release-discretion-and-prison-population-size-state-reports).

United States. Bureau of Justice Statistics. National Corrections Reporting Program, 1991-2020: Selected Variables. Inter-university Consortium for Political and Social Research [distributor], 2022-11-28. [https://doi.org/10.3886/ICPSR38492.v1](https://doi.org/10.3886/ICPSR38492.v1). 
:::

<br><br>

---
title: "`r state_for_report`"
---
